details.change: Replace let resolve: any → let resolve: (value?: unknown) => void
details.deviation: plan had () => void, adjusted to optional param because resolve is assigned from Promise resolver which takes (value: unknown) => void

details.change: Replace : any → Generator<Effect.Effect<unknown, unknown, never>, void, unknown> on walkDirectory return type
details.deviation: plan had Effect.Effect<void>, adjusted to Generator type because walkDirectory is a recursive generator function wrapped in Effect.fnUntraced — explicit Generator type needed for recursive inference

details.change: Add Exit to import + replace exit: any → Exit.Exit<unknown, unknown>
details.deviation: plan had never error channel, adjusted to unknown due to variance conflict with Effect.map context

details.change: Add import type { RuntimeEvent } + replace 4 any annotations → RuntimeEvent
Add ClaimRow, ShapedClaim, PathTreeNode, TreeNode type aliases + replace 6 any usages in buildPathTree/convert
details.deviation: Added TreeNode intermediate type (not in plan) to avoid as any casts; plan's Record<string, unknown> fallback was insufficient for the mutable tree-building code
